---

## Overview

> Climate forecasting model using satellite NDDI data.

**Drought Early Warning NDDI LSTM ** is an advanced machine learning / ai system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. Built with Streamlit, PyTorch, TensorFlow.

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Raw Data Input"] -->|"Ingest"| B["Preprocessing Pipeline"];
    B -->|"Clean Tensors"| D{"TF + PyTorch Engine"};
    D -->|"Training Loop"| E["Inference & Prediction"];
    E -->|"Live Results"| W["Streamlit Dashboard"];
    E -->|"Metrics"| F["Evaluation & Output"];

    style A fill:#1a0800,stroke:#f0883e,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#2d1000,stroke:#f0883e,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style D fill:#1a0800,stroke:#f0883e,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff
    style E fill:#2d1000,stroke:#f0883e,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style F fill:#451a00,stroke:#f0883e,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
Drought-Early-Warning-NDDI-LSTM-/
  .gitignore
  AI.ipynb
  COMPREHENSIVE_UPGRADE_SUMMARY.md
  DASHBOARD_GUIDE.md
  LICENSE
  LOADING_IMPROVEMENTS.md
  MODEL_COMPARISON_UPDATE.md
  Procfile
  .devcontainer/
    devcontainer.json
  .streamlit/
    config.toml
  catboost_info/
    catboost_training.json
    learn_error.tsv
    test_error.tsv
    time_left.tsv
  scripts/
    smoke_test.py
  src/
```

<br/>

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `Jupyter Notebook` |
| **Project Category** | `Machine Learning / AI` |
| **Total Source Files** | `63` |
| **Frameworks** | `Streamlit`, `PyTorch`, `TensorFlow` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |

## Dependencies

<p align="left">
  <code>torch</code>  <code>scikit-learn</code>  <code>pyyaml</code>  <code>plotly</code>  <code>tensorflow</code>  <code>requests</code>  <code>pandas</code>  <code>pydantic</code>  <code>scipy</code>  <code>rasterio</code>  <code>streamlit</code>  <code>kaggle</code>  <code>keras</code>  <code>numpy</code>  <code>catboost</code>
</p>
